# Portfolio Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is an industry-standard Python Flask portfolio website with comprehensive compliance features.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Flask 3.x
- **Templating**: Jinja2 with accessible HTML
- **Styling**: CSS with accessibility features
- **Database**: SQLite (development) / PostgreSQL (production)

## Code Standards
- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines
- Use type hints for all functions
- Run Black for formatting before committing
- Ensure Ruff linting passes
- Maintain 80%+ test coverage

## Security Guidelines
- Never commit secrets or .env files
- Use environment variables for configuration
- Validate all user inputs
- Follow OWASP Top 10 guidelines
- Run Bandit security checks

## Accessibility Requirements
- Follow WCAG 2.1 AA standards
- Use semantic HTML elements
- Include ARIA labels where needed
- Ensure keyboard navigation works
- Maintain color contrast ratios

## GDPR/Privacy Compliance
- Implement cookie consent
- Provide data export functionality
- Include privacy policy
- Log data access appropriately
